_note: Real response produced by POST /analyze-ticket for the public SAMPLE-01 input. Generated by running src/analyzer on SUST_Preli_Sample_Cases.json.

request.complaint: I sent 5000 taka to a wrong number around 2pm today. The number was supposed to be 01712345678 but I think I typed it wrong. The person isn't responding to my call. Please help me get my money back.

response.agent_summary: Customer claims TXN-9101 (5000 BDT) to +8801719876543 was sent to the wrong recipient.
response.recommended_next_action: Verify TXN-9101 details with the customer and initiate the wrong-transfer dispute workflow per policy.
response.customer_reply: We have received your request regarding transaction TXN-9101. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone. Our dispute team will review the case carefully and contact you through official support channels.
